ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the content */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the content */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer who created the content */,
  "price" REAL /* Price charged for the content */,
  "copyscape_status" TEXT /* Status of the Copyscape plagiarism check */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the content is created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the content belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is active or archived */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords for SEO */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Actual text of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or archived */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the writer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the writer is active or archived */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the writer was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the writer was last modified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the writer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the content (e.g., Draft, Review, Published) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_status_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plagiarism_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plagiarism check */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the plagiarism check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the plagiarism check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "score" REAL /* Plagiarism score */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the plagiarism report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plagiarism_checks_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plagiarism_checks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client is active or archived */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was last modified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the project is created */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is active or archived */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_content" (
  "project_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between content and projects */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is active or archived */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_content_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_content_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who is being invoiced */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the invoice is generated */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount invoiced */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the invoice has been paid */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was paid */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
